name: anvil
description: Local-first, runtime-neutral project state for humans and AI coding agents — turn PRDs into lockable, evidence-backed work packets.

interface.shortDescription: Local-first project state for AI coding agents
interface.longDescription: Anvil turns PRDs into lockable, evidence-backed work packets agents can claim, execute, and verify — durable SQLite state, claim/lease coordination for parallel agents, and evidence-gated completion. Runtime-neutral: the same project state drives Codex, Claude, and other harnesses.
defaultPrompt: Start a PRD for this project
Plan the PRD into ready tasks
Claim the next ready task and execute it
